use std::path::Path;
use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn count_matching(root: &str, ext: &str) -> usize {
    let mut count = 0;
    for entry in WalkDir::new(root) {
        let entry = match entry {
            Ok(e) => e,
            Err(_) => continue,
        };
        if entry.path().extension().map_or(false, |e| e == ext) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    count
}

fn process_streaming(root: &str) {
    for entry in WalkDir::new(root).max_depth(3) {
        let entry = match entry {
            Ok(e) => e,
            Err(_) => continue,
        };
        if entry.file_type().is_file() {
            if let Ok(meta) = std::fs::metadata(entry.path()) {
                println!("{}: {} bytes", entry.path().display(), meta.len());
            }
        }
    }
}
